title: ScNick
description: Simple Nick plugin. Part of the Sc (Scripted Minecraft Server Tools) series of plugins.
body:
# Functions
Changes the name of a player everywhere, except the nametag using the command:
```
/nick player nick|reset
```

# Active developement
I, as a single dev, am constantly trying to make my plugins better and I'd love feedback on bugs, new features or even plugin suggestions. I develop plugins in my free time and I can get commisioned to make a plugin for free as long as the request isn't too complex. 

# Backstory
Originaly commisioned by the Noxa SMP, this plugin was made as a lightweight and open-source option for changing players names especially in scripted servers. The plugin is part of the Sc series which is meant for scripted minecraft servers (other plugins of this series: ScKillMsgSpam, ScDisguise, ...).
